project.name: BLADE Admin Root Redirect
project.description: The virtual host's default web app (context-root "/"). 302-redirects "/", "/blade", and any unowned path to /blade/portal/, so users can type either / or /blade and land in the admin portal. Zero deps; just a JSP mapped to /*. WLS longest-prefix-match keeps /blade/portal/, /blade/configurator/, etc. routing to their own WARs unchanged.
